ev_corrupt_fungal_defeat.description: Hello? Can you hear me? It's Professor Lyra.
ev_corrupt_fungal_defeat.title: Professor Lyra

ev_corrupt_fungal_defeat.description: Oh, oh my, so that's what happened to him...
ev_corrupt_fungal_defeat.title: Professor Lyra

ev_corrupt_fungal_defeat.description: I'll see who I can get in contact with, in the meantime lets get you out of there.
ev_corrupt_fungal_defeat.title: Professor Lyra

ev_corrupt_fungal_defeat.description: Please come back to the Hub and get some rest. I'll see you when you arrive.
ev_corrupt_fungal_defeat.title: Professor Lyra

ev_corrupt_tech_defeat.description: Ah, hello there! It sounds like you've retrived the Lavaboard Prototype.
ev_corrupt_tech_defeat.title: Engineer Al

ev_corrupt_tech_defeat.description: Bring it back here and we'll see about getting it functional for you!
ev_corrupt_tech_defeat.objective: Return the Lavaboard Prototype to Al
ev_corrupt_tech_defeat.title: Engineer Al

ev_corrupt_tech_defeat.description: Wait, what's that? The one who took it was all covered in Tech? And there was another like this in the fungal caves?
ev_corrupt_tech_defeat.title: Engineer Al

ev_corrupt_tech_defeat.description: I'll contact Professor Lyra, hopefully she'll have some insight on this matter.
ev_corrupt_tech_defeat.title: Engineer Al

ev_cromet_defeated.description: Ah, hello, seems like your comms are working!
ev_cromet_defeated.title: Professor Lyra

ev_cromet_defeated.description: It's great to hear you've dealt with the Cromet situation! They're a rarely seen species, so I appreciate the extra effort!
ev_cromet_defeated.title: Professor Lyra

ev_cromet_defeated.description: Please investigate the cave system to the North-West! The researchers there seem to be having some trouble.
ev_cromet_defeated.objective: Investigate the Caves to the North-West
ev_cromet_defeated.title: Professor Lyra

ev_disk_placed.description: *The Data Disk clicks as you insert it into the old machine*
Finally we can get outta here!
ev_disk_placed.title: Rival Cade

ev_disk_placed.description: Catch ya topside, I'm tired of this cave!
ev_disk_placed.objective: Use a Save Station to teleport to the Hub, then meet with Professor Lyra
ev_disk_placed.title: Rival Cade

ev_final_battle1.description: *A creature of crystal and flesh rises before you...*
*A large glowing eye glows brightly...*
*The creature attacks!*
*The creature is defeated, but from it's body arises a new threat!*
You didn't think I'd chicken out after our fight in the tunnel now, did you?
ev_final_battle1.title: Rival Cade

ev_final_battle1.description: Let's get do this, can't have you hogging all the glory now!
ev_final_battle1.title: Rival Cade

ev_final_battle1.description: *the serpent seems to be defeated*
*it disappears into an inky black void*
We... we did it, right?
ev_final_battle1.title: Rival Cade

ev_final_battle1.description: Ahahaha, I knew it couldn't be *too* difficult.
ev_final_battle1.title: Rival Cade

ev_final_battle1.description: I mean, uh, you were good to, yeah.
ev_final_battle1.title: Rival Cade

ev_final_battle1.description: *radio static*
{player}? Cade? Are you two safe?
ev_final_battle1.title: Professor Lyra

ev_final_battle1.description: Oh thank goodness, you are. Katerina just came stumbling out of the Restricted Tunnel.
ev_final_battle1.title: Professor Lyra

ev_final_battle1.description: I passed her on the way here, she doin' okay?
ev_final_battle1.title: Rival Cade

ev_final_battle1.description: Well, she could certainly be better, but she tells me she wouldn't have made it out of there without you two.
ev_final_battle1.title: Professor Lyra

ev_final_battle1.description: What are you--
ev_final_battle1.title: Professor Lyra

ev_final_battle1.description: Hey, I hate to break up the happy talk and stuff, but {player} and Cade need to get out of there, now!
ev_final_battle1.title: Engineer Al

ev_final_battle1.description: That section of the cave's about to collapse! Hurry on back topside, pronto!
ev_final_battle1.title: Engineer Al

ev_final_battle1.description: Well, you heard 'em, let's get back to the Hub. Race ya there!
ev_final_battle1.title: Rival Cade

ev_final_battle1.description: *Cade sprints on ahead, and you are quick to follow as the cave begins to collapse*
So the story comes to a close, but there's still more for you to do, {player}.
ev_final_battle1.title: Note from the Devs

ev_final_battle1.description: Keep on exploring, discovering, and trying new things!
ev_final_battle1.title: Note from the Devs

ev_final_battle1.description: And most importantly, thank you for playing!!!
ev_final_battle1.title: Note from the Devs

ev_get_moistri.description: As the Seer Sister departs, a strange Oochamon begins to form from the lake itself...

ev_intro.description: `Error: Unable to load appearance data. Loading visualizer now.`
ev_intro.title: Intro

ev_intro.description: `No additional discrepancies detected. Proceeding to Oochamon partner selection.`
ev_intro.title: Intro

ev_intro.description:
Please select an Oochamon to join you.
- **Sporbee** is a Fungal type Oochamon
- **Roocky** is a Stone type Oochamon.
- **Puppyre** is a Flame type Oochamon.
ev_intro.title: Intro

ev_intro.description: Would you like to play a tutorial? This will teach you the basics if you're new to the game.
ev_intro.title: Intro

ev_intro.description: `Skipping tutorial session. Please, enjoy your flight to the planet's surface, {player}.`
ev_intro.title: Intro

ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.description: Ah, welcome back, and thank you for the rescue, {player}.
ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.title: Professor Lyra

ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.description: Seriously, thanks, I had no idea the Prof was in so much danger.
ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.title: Engineer Al

ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.description: Oh, and Prof, have you heard anything back from Cade?
ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.title: Engineer Al

ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.description: Not yet, but I have left him some messages, hopefully he'll reach out soon.
ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.title: Professor Lyra

ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.description: Before we proceed further, {player}, it's probably best to make sure you're ready to deal with what's ahead. Prepare yourself!
ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.title: Professor Lyra

ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.description: Now, I suppose I owe you an explanation for everything that's been going on.
ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.title: Professor Lyra

ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.description: As I'm sure you've noticed, some researchers have been corrupted by some sort of influence within the planet.
ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.title: Professor Lyra

ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.description: I'm afraid that influence is some sort of Oochamon, deep below the planet's surface.
ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.title: Professor Lyra

ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.description: Kat seems to have come under its influence and is attempting to reach it via the Restricted Tunnel.
ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.title: Professor Lyra

ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.description: I don't know what she's getting out of this, but I know it can't be good for us or the Oochamon on this planet.
ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.title: Professor Lyra

ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.description: I'll try to pull some strings on my end. For now, I think Lyra and I can both place our trust in you, {player}.
ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.title: Engineer Al

ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.description: I'll let you know if I have any luck!
ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.title: Engineer Al

ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.description: Thank you, both of you, so much! I know you can do this, {player}.
ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.objective: Travel South and through the Restricted Tunnel
ev_lyra_al_post_powerplant.title: Professor Lyra

ev_lyra_kat_dialog.description: -don't you understand, Kat? You're making the wrong decision here!
ev_lyra_kat_dialog.title: Professor Lyra

ev_lyra_kat_dialog.description: It's too late for that, I'm taking the data, and making that deal with the Core.
ev_lyra_kat_dialog.title: CFO Katerina

ev_lyra_kat_dialog.description: No, please don't, I can't lose you too. Not after your parents made the same mistake.
ev_lyra_kat_dialog.title: Professor Lyra

ev_lyra_kat_dialog.description: Look, this is what I have to do. I promise I'll make it work.
ev_lyra_kat_dialog.title: CFO Katerina

ev_lyra_kat_dialog.description: I've even made a discovery that should fix this deeper within the powerplant, just trust me.
ev_lyra_kat_dialog.title: CFO Katerina

ev_lyra_locked.description: I don't know what's gotten into my granddaughter, she's barely been herself recently.
ev_lyra_locked.title: Professor Lyra

ev_lyra_locked.description: After we got the data she needed, she locked me in here and ran off to the Restricted Tunnel.
ev_lyra_locked.title: Professor Lyra

ev_lyra_locked.description: There's some sort of main security system up ahead keeping me locked in here, destroy it and I think we might just be able to catch up with her.
ev_lyra_locked.title: Professor Lyra

ev_lyra_locked.description: I know you can do it, {player}!
ev_lyra_locked.title: Professor Lyra

ev_magic_mirror.description: *a magical mirror is embedded in the floor*
*as you approach it, a piece breaks off*

With the Magic Mirror, you can use Skins.
To equip a skin:
- Go to your Bag
- Look for the Skins tab
- Use the skin you want to equip
ev_magic_mirror.title: Tutorial

ev_meet_al_access_tunnel.description: Hey there, {player}, you have a minute?
ev_meet_al_access_tunnel.title: Engineer Al

ev_meet_al_access_tunnel.description: I'm a bit preoccupied at the moment, but could you meet me at the southern entrance of the Access Tunnel?
ev_meet_al_access_tunnel.title: Engineer Al

ev_meet_al_access_tunnel.description: It'd be just a bit North of the Hub. Thanks, see you there!
ev_meet_al_access_tunnel.objective: Meet Al at the Access Tunnel entrance north of the Hub
ev_meet_al_access_tunnel.title: Engineer Al

ev_moldire_boss.description: Ah, hello, you've got a flower sample have you? And a rather strange one at that?
ev_moldire_boss.title: Engineer Al

ev_moldire_boss.description: Well, bring it on down to the the Lavapath Settlement and we'll see what can be done with it!
ev_moldire_boss.objective: Deliver the Flower Sample to Al
ev_moldire_boss.title: Engineer Al

ev_nullifly.description: *As they're about to say something to you, they vanish into nothingness and where they once were an unknown Oochamon appears!*
*The Oochamon, now calmed, collapses into a single point and disappears into a prism.*

ev_rival_intro.description: Thought you could get ahead of me, didn't you?
It's me, Cade, I knew you couldn't forget about me!
ev_rival_intro.title: Cade

ev_rival_intro.description: What do you say we have a little battle here? I hear you've got your first Oochamon, and I've been wanting to battle!
ev_rival_intro.title: Cade

ev_rival_intro.description: I was uh... Just going easy on you, yeah. There's no way you'd win if we battled it out for real!
ev_rival_intro.title: Cade

ev_rival_intro.description: Anyway, I've got some business to take care of, see ya around!
ev_rival_intro.title: Cade

ev_roswier.description: The computer screen seems to glow with an eerie light.
A glowing eye appears in the screen's center.

ev_save_tutorial.description: Very good! These save stations will digitally scan you and your team of Oochamon and fully heal them.
ev_save_tutorial.title: Professor Lyra

ev_save_tutorial.description: They can also be used to set a checkpoint to return to should your party be defeated.
ev_save_tutorial.title: Professor Lyra

ev_save_tutorial.description: When you're ready, come speak to me again!
ev_save_tutorial.title: Professor Lyra

ev_scaffolds_1.description: I'll make sure nothing sneaks up on us.
ev_scaffolds_1.title: Rival Cade

ev_scaffolds_1.description: Just, y'know, make sure you stick close by... for your safety of course, I'm totally fine.
ev_scaffolds_1.title: Rival Cade

ev_scaffolds_2.description: Do you get the feeling something's watching us out there?
ev_scaffolds_2.title: Rival Cade

ev_scaffolds_2.description: Every now and then I swear there's some sort of eye in the corner of my vision...
ev_scaffolds_2.title: Rival Cade

ev_scaffolds_4.description: Aha! I think I see some light up ahead!
ev_scaffolds_4.title: Rival Cade

ev_scaffolds_4.description: I knew we would make it, I totally wasn't nervous at all!
ev_scaffolds_4.title: Rival Cade

ev_scaffolds_4.description: Catch you on the other side!
ev_scaffolds_4.title: Rival Cade

ev_scaffolds_4.description: *You can't shake the feeling that something's still watching you from within the shadows.*

ev_security_boss.description: Returning to Hybernation and Repair Mode
ev_security_boss.objective: Return to Lyra in the Powerplant
ev_security_boss.title: Security System Δ

ev_seer_battle.description: And you've returned to see us...
ev_seer_battle.title: Seer Sister Anna

ev_seer_battle.description: And now, we fight as one!
ev_seer_battle.title: Seer Sisters

ev_seer_battle.description: Go forth, and challenge the master of Thunder Peak.
ev_seer_battle.title: Seer Sisters

info.custom_start_text: A Giant Slime Head emerges before you!
info.name: Giant Slime Head

ev_slimehead_big.description: Oh, thank goodness, I've finally reached you!
ev_slimehead_big.title: Professor Lyra

ev_slimehead_big.description: We've been trying to reach you and Cade for what feels like ages!
ev_slimehead_big.title: Professor Lyra

ev_slimehead_big.description: Hey! You're down in the Goo Lake aren't ya?
ev_slimehead_big.title: Engineer Al

ev_slimehead_big.description: If you happen across a researcher holding a Data Disk, the guy was *supposed* to be-
ev_slimehead_big.title: Engineer Al

ev_slimehead_big.description: Oh what's that? You found it? Well that's just perfect! There should be a small cave near the shore around there.
ev_slimehead_big.title: Engineer Al

ev_slimehead_big.description: If ya use the Data Disk on the machine inside that cave it *should* enable our teleporter network, and we can finally get you guys outta there!
ev_slimehead_big.objective: Use the Data Disk on the Machine inside a cave near the coast..
ev_slimehead_big.title: Engineer Al

ev_slimehead_big.description: Well I suppose that settles that, doesn't it, please return safely!
ev_slimehead_big.title: Professor Lyra

ev_slimehead_big.description: I'll make sure to relay the good news to Cade, the poor thing must be scared.
ev_slimehead_big.title: Professor Lyra

ev_symaat.description: You may call me the Balancer...
ev_symaat.title: The Balancer

ev_symaat.description: Well, let us see if you're worthy of Syma'at's power as well...
ev_symaat.title: The Balancer

ev_symaat.description: Ahaha, you truly a worthy weilder of it's power!
ev_symaat.title: The Balancer

ev_symaat.description: Now, now, don't be shy. Weild Syma'at's power as you see fit!
ev_symaat.title: The Balancer

ev_symaat.description: May you continue your journey , we will be watching...
ev_symaat.title: The Balancer

ev_trapped_in_tunnel.description: What was that horrid noise? Are you alright, dear?
ev_trapped_in_tunnel.title: Professor Lyra

ev_trapped_in_tunnel.description: Oh my, the tunnel's collapsed? That is a bit of a bother...
ev_trapped_in_tunnel.title: Professor Lyra

ev_trapped_in_tunnel.description: Well, I think we can figure something out here... Hmm...
ev_trapped_in_tunnel.title: Professor Lyra

ev_trapped_in_tunnel.description: There should be an elevator nearby, it'll take you a bit out of the way, but I think it'll be worth your time!
ev_trapped_in_tunnel.title: Professor Lyra

ev_trapped_in_tunnel.description: A team of scientists went missing down there, but they were on the verge of finishing our teleporter network!
ev_trapped_in_tunnel.title: Professor Lyra

ev_trapped_in_tunnel.description: If you find the team, someone should be carrying a Displacement Disk, the final part needed. Oh, I do hope they're all okay.
ev_trapped_in_tunnel.objective: Travel to Goo Lake and retrieve the Displacement Disk.
ev_trapped_in_tunnel.title: Professor Lyra

ev_trapped_in_tunnel.description: Be safe! I'll check in with you and Cade again soon!
ev_trapped_in_tunnel.title: Professor Lyra

ev_trapped_in_tunnel.description: Ok, so we're stuck with eachother then? *Great...*
ev_trapped_in_tunnel.title: Rival Cade

ev_trapped_in_tunnel.description: Well, lets go check out that elevator Lyra mentioned. Hopefully we're not stuck with eachother for too long.
ev_trapped_in_tunnel.title: Rival Cade

ev_trapped_in_tunnel.description:
Come on, lets get going...
*[Rival Cade has joined the party]*
ev_trapped_in_tunnel.title: Rival Cade

ev_tutorial_1.description: Welcome to the world of Oochamon! I am a disembodied voice, I don't have a name, but you can call me the Tutorial Master!

To start, let's teach you how to properly move. Use the arrow buttons to move, and move up to the door!

The other 2 buttons on the top left and top right will be explained soon, so don't worry too much about them yet.
ev_tutorial_1.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_2.description: Let's also show you how to use *advanced movement tech!* (oooh, ahhh)
ev_tutorial_2.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_2.description:
You can **jump** ahead tiles by clicking the number on the top left of the buttons to change your speed.
You can also type a number in chat to quickly change this number, when not in dialogue.
ev_tutorial_2.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_2.description: For example, if you type in "3" in the chat after this chat, it will change your tile jump to 3!
ev_tutorial_2.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_3.description: On top of discord buttons for movement, you also have the option to do **message based movement!**
ev_tutorial_3.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_3.description: To do this, you can type `w`, `a`, `s` or `d` in the chat to move in one of the 4 directions.
ev_tutorial_3.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_3.description: You can also jump ahead tiles by putting a number after the direction, something like `w2` or `d4`.
ev_tutorial_3.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_3.description:
Finally, you can chain these together to move lots of spaces at once. For example, you can do `w2d4` to move up 2 then right 4
Or you could do something like `wwwdd` to move up 3 then right 2. There's a lot of possibility with it!
ev_tutorial_3.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_3.description:
Try out some things, then move on. If you'd like more information on controls, run `/lookup controls` for a detailed explanation of text based movement!

**Note: Text message based movement may be a bit laggier than using the buttons. This is not a bug, just an unavoidable Discord problem.**
ev_tutorial_3.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_4.description: Now, check out your menu with `/menu`, or by clicking the 3 horizontal lines on the top left of the discord buttons.
ev_tutorial_4.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_4.description: Go check it out, and play around in the menu to learn about it a little bit. There's even a settings menu where you can disable discord move buttons, text popups, and more!
ev_tutorial_4.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_4.description: Head over to the next door upwards as soon as you are ready to move on.
ev_tutorial_4.objective: Check out the menu, then move on.
ev_tutorial_4.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_5.description: Let's get you a few items to start with. Here's a few Potions and a Perfect Prism, which can catch any Oochamon at a 100% chance.
ev_tutorial_5.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_5.description: Prisms are our way of capturing and taming the wild Oochamon of the world. It's very painless for them, I assure you.
ev_tutorial_5.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_5.description: Let's try out catching an Oochamon now. I've created a simulated Oochamon for you to learn catching with! It's inside the chest.
ev_tutorial_5.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_5.description:
You won't be able to keep this Oochamon after the tutorial, this is just to teach you how to capture things.
You will have ample opportunity to catch more on the planet.
ev_tutorial_5.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_5.description:
Now go catch that Oochamon, then move on!
Also, please don't try to fight it. It's quite powerful!
ev_tutorial_5.objective: Catch the Oochamon, and move on to the next door.
ev_tutorial_5.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_6.description: Great work! If you look at that new Oochamon in your menu, you'll find its information, alongside some stars next to its stats.
ev_tutorial_6.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_6.description: The stars are extra bonus stats, which are a special power an Oochamon has, unique to itself, that increase its various stats based on random chance.
ev_tutorial_6.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_6.description: The best bonus an Oochamon can have is 5 stars towards a stat. Every Oochamon is unique, so make sure to check your stat bonuses when you catch an Oochamon!
ev_tutorial_6.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_6.description:
The researchers on base have been researching a special type of crystal to increase these bonuses after an Oochamon is born, but I don't know much about that.
You'll have to find out about it on your own!
ev_tutorial_6.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_6.description: Oochamon also have special abilities! You can view what your Oochamon ability does using `/lookup ability`.
ev_tutorial_6.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_6.description: On that note, `/lookup` has a few other things to view as well, so keep the command in mind!
ev_tutorial_6.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_6.description: Move to the next door when you are ready.
ev_tutorial_6.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_7.description: Let's learn about the bread and butter of Oochamon. Trainer fights!
ev_tutorial_7.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_7.description: I've created a simulated trainer for you to fight. It's not a real person, but it still has feelings.
ev_tutorial_7.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_7.description:
One useful tip! If your move is super effective or not very effective, it'll be green or red respectively.
If it doesn't do damage and instead has a different effect, it'll be grey, and if its neutral effective, it'll be blue!
ev_tutorial_7.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_7.description: Anyways, go beat him up! This will be a good way for you to learn how to fight.
ev_tutorial_7.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_8.description: Great work. I knew you could do it! I'll give SimTrainer a cyber cookie later to make him feel better.
ev_tutorial_8.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_8.description: That's basically how the game works. Catch Oochamon, beat up people's teams of Oochamon, and save the world!
ev_tutorial_8.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_8.description: Or something. I'm not your parent. See ya, and enjoy the grand world of Oochamon!
ev_tutorial_8.title: Tutorial Master

ev_tutorial_8.description:
Oh! I almost forgot, you can also trade with other players using `/trade`. Try it out sometime with your friends!
Bye bye!
ev_tutorial_8.title: Tutorial Master

ev_used_data_disk.description: `---Please access the nearest Save Station to access the Teleportation Network---`
ev_used_data_disk.objective: Use a Save Station to teleport back to the Hub.
